intro: Between April 12 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published 50 articles on supply-chain security. The reporting details activity from distinct threat actors, including Lazarus Group and TeamPCP, and tracks exploitation of specific vulnerabilities such as CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177. These incidents primarily targeted the technology, logistics, manufacturing, cryptocurrency, and financial-services sectors across Global, European, Asian, and North American regions. The covered threats reflect a severity mix of 6 critical, 30 high, 9 medium, and 4 informational events, illustrating the varied risk landscape organizations faced during this period.
